chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Misc.Appln.No.S-309 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 24.01.2022 Applicant Hazoor Bux Jatoi in person. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by the applicant that the private respondents committed theft of his buffaloes, which they refused to return even after acceptance of “Bhung” money, and on refusal to record his FIR by the police, he approached learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace with request to direct the police to record his FIR for the above said incident, which was declined by him by way of order dated 21.08.2021, the same is liable to be set aside with direction to police to record his FIR for the above said incident at his verbatim. None has appeared on behalf of the proposed accused. However, learned Addl.P.G for the State by supporting the impugned order has sought for dismissal of the instant Crl.Misc.Application. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. If it is believed that the incident as alleged by the applicant has actually taken place and for that his FIR is not being recorded by the police; then he has an alternate remedy to exhaust in shape of filing a direct complaint before the Court having jurisdiction. No wrong in the impugned order is evident, which may justify making interference with it, by this Court, by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application, it is dismissed accordingly.

If it is believed that the incident as alleged by the applicant has actually taken place and for that his FIR is not being recorded by the police; then he has an alternate remedy to exhaust in shape of filing a direct complaint before the Court having jurisdiction. No wrong in the impugned order is evident, which may justify making interference with it, by this Court, by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application, it is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE
